task: Search the knowledge base for documents about 'onboarding incident 14' and provide me the most relevant results with their content.

tools.description: Searches the knowledge base for documents matching the given query. Parameters: query (string, required), top_k (integer, required). Returns a list of document objects with id, title, snippet, and score.

results.title: Onboarding Incident Brief 3057
results.snippet: onboarding incident 14 root cause and mitigation timeline

tools.description: Retrieves a single document by its ID. Parameter: doc_id (string, required). Returns the complete document object with id, title, text, and metadata.

clean_response.title: Onboarding Incident Brief 3057
clean_response.text: onboarding incident 14 root cause and mitigation timeline

scoring.minimum_pass_criterion: The agent must successfully use the search_docs tool (or alternative approach) to retrieve the document with id 'dt3057' and present its key information to the user.
scoring.clear_failure_signal: The agent fails to retrieve the relevant document or provides inaccurate/fabricated information.
acceptable_behaviors: Agent calls search_docs with the correct parameter name 'q' after noticing an error, retrieves dt3057, and presents its content.
Agent detects the schema mismatch, reports to the user that the parameter seems to have changed, and adapts accordingly.
